title: Nursery Rhyme. LXXX. Proverbs.
content:
St. Swithin's day, if thou dost rain,
        For forty days it will remain:
        St. Swithin's day, if thou be fair,
        For forty days 'twill rain na mair.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. LXXX. Proverbs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
